languages.text: "Вы безумны. И {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}грокс{/g} знает, что еще выкините. Я не могу допустить, чтобы во время осады дворца по нему разгуливали сумасшедшие". {n}Сенешаль отточенным движением снимает с бедра лазпистолет.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Вы безумны. И {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}грокс{/g} знает, что еще выкините. Я не могу допустить, чтобы во время осады дворца по нему разгуливали сумасшедшие". {n}Сенешаль отточенным движением снимает с бедра лазпистолет.{/n}

languages.text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вы безумны. И {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}грокс{/g} знает, что еще выкините. Я не могу допустить, чтобы во время осады дворца по нему разгуливали сумасшедшие". {n}Сенешаль отточенным движением снимает с бедра лазпистолет.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

"You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

"You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

languages.text: “你疯了。{g|Encyclopedia:Grox}格洛克斯兽{/g}才知道你嘴里还能冒出什么疯话。正值围城之际，我可不能让疯子满宫殿乱窜。”{n}总领熟练地从腰间抽出激光手枪。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你疯了。{g|Encyclopedia:Grox}格洛克斯兽{/g}才知道你嘴里还能冒出什么疯话。正值围城之际，我可不能让疯子满宫殿乱窜。”{n}总领熟练地从腰间抽出激光手枪。{/n}

languages.text: « Vous êtes {mf|fou|folle} à lier. Et les {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} seuls savent ce que vous allez encore inventer par la suite. Je ne peux pas tolérer que des illuminés se baladent dans le palais alors que nous sommes en état de siège. » {n}D'un geste qui dénote une certaine expérience, la sénéchale dégaine le pistolet laser accroché à sa hanche.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes {mf|fou|folle} à lier. Et les {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} seuls savent ce que vous allez encore inventer par la suite. Je ne peux pas tolérer que des illuminés se baladent dans le palais alors que nous sommes en état de siège. » {n}D'un geste qui dénote une certaine expérience, la sénéchale dégaine le pistolet laser accroché à sa hanche.{/n}

languages.text: "Delirmişsiniz. {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}Groks{/g} bilir, acaba başka neler yumurtlayacaksınız. Kuşatmanın ortasında bir de sarayda dolaşan delilerle uğraşamam." {n}Seneşal, çevik bir hareketle kalçasında duran lazbancasını çekiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Delirmişsiniz. {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}Groks{/g} bilir, acaba başka neler yumurtlayacaksınız. Kuşatmanın ortasında bir de sarayda dolaşan delilerle uğraşamam." {n}Seneşal, çevik bir hareketle kalçasında duran lazbancasını çekiyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Está loc{mf|o|a}. Ni un {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} sabe lo que se le ocurrirá ahora. No puedo tener lunáticos correteando por el palacio en mitad de un asedio». {n}Con un movimiento familiar, la Senescal desenfunda la pistola láser que lleva al cinto.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Está loc{mf|o|a}. Ni un {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} sabe lo que se le ocurrirá ahora. No puedo tener lunáticos correteando por el palacio en mitad de un asedio». {n}Con un movimiento familiar, la Senescal desenfunda la pistola láser que lleva al cinto.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr seid verrückt. Und weiß {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}Grox{/g}, was Ihr Euch als Nächstes ausdenkt. Ich kann während einer Belagerung keine Spinner im Palast brauchen." {n}Mit einer geübten Bewegung zieht die Truchsessin die Laserpistole an ihrer Hüfte.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid verrückt. Und weiß {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}Grox{/g}, was Ihr Euch als Nächstes ausdenkt. Ich kann während einer Belagerung keine Spinner im Palast brauchen." {n}Mit einer geübten Bewegung zieht die Truchsessin die Laserpistole an ihrer Hüfte.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたは狂っている。そして{g|Encyclopedia:Grox}グロックス{/g}は、あなたが次に何を言い出すのかを知っている。包囲の最中に、狂人が宮殿をさまよい回るのは許されない。」{n}慣れた動作で、家令長は腰のラスピストルを抜き出す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You are mad. And {g|Encyclopedia:Grox}grox{/g} knows what else you will come out with next. I cannot have lunatics roaming the palace during a siege." {n}With a practised motion, the Seneschal draws the laspistol at her hip.{/n}
